1: package com.example.sophiaquest.utils
2: 
3: import android.app.NotificationChannel
4: import android.app.NotificationManager
5: import android.app.PendingIntent
6: import android.content.Context
7: import android.content.Intent
8: import android.os.Build
9: import androidx.core.app.NotificationCompat
10: import androidx.work.CoroutineWorker
11: import androidx.work.WorkerParameters
12: import com.example.sophiaquest.MainActivity
13: 
14: class ReminderWorker(
15:     context: Context,
16:     workerParams: WorkerParameters
17: ) : CoroutineWorker(context, workerParams) {
18: 
19:     override suspend fun doWork(): Result {
20:         val reminderType = inputData.getString("reminder_type") ?: "DAILY"
21:         sendNotification(reminderType)
22:         return Result.success()
23:     }
24: 
25:     private fun sendNotification(type: String) {
26:         val channelId = "sophia_quest_reminders"
27:         val channelName = "Sophia's Quest Reminders"
28:         val notificationManager = applicationContext.getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
29: 
30:         // Create Channel for Android 8.0+
31:         if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
32:             val channel = NotificationChannel(
33:                 channelId,
34:                 channelName,
35:                 NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_DEFAULT
36:             ).apply {
37:                 description = "Gentle daily routine and weekly jar check reminders"
38:             }
39:             notificationManager.createNotificationChannel(channel)
40:         }
41: 
42:         // Tap action
43:         val intent = Intent(applicationContext, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
44:             flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TASK
45:         }
46:         val pendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
47:             applicationContext,
48:             0,
49:             intent,
50:             PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
51:         )
52: 
53:         // Notification content
54:         val title = if (type == "WEEKLY") "Weekly Jar Check 🪙" else "Sophia's Quest 🐉"
55:         val text = if (type == "WEEKLY") {
56:             "Let's count our coins and reconcile our savings!"
57:         } else {
58:             "Time for daily chores and earning stars!"
59:         }
60: 
61:         // App Icon
62:         val iconResId = android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info // Standard system fallback icon
63: 
64:         val builder = NotificationCompat.Builder(applicationContext, channelId)
65:             .setSmallIcon(iconResId)
66:             .setContentTitle(title)
67:             .setContentText(text)
68:             .setPriority(NotificationCompat.PRIORITY_DEFAULT)
69:             .setContentIntent(pendingIntent)
70:             .setAutoCancel(true)
71: 
72:         val notificationId = if (type == "WEEKLY") 1002 else 1001
73:         try {
74:             notificationManager.notify(notificationId, builder.build())
75:         } catch (e: SecurityException) {
76:             e.printStackTrace()
77:         }
78:     }
79: }
80:

{
  "AllowMultiple": "false",
  "Description": "\"Fix notifications permission request flow so toggling daily or weekly reminders actually updates settings and schedules work upon permission grant.\"",
  "EndLine": "211",
  "Instruction": "\"Replace the permissionLauncher and checkAndRequestPermission methods with a stateful pending action callback mechanism.\"",
  "ReplacementContent": "\"    var pendingActionOnPermission by remember { mutableStateOf<(() -> Unit)?>(null) }\\n\\n    val permissionLauncher = rememberLauncherForActivityResult(\\n        contract = ActivityResultContracts.RequestPermission()\\n    ) { isGranted ->\\n        if (isGranted) {\\n            pendingActionOnPermission?.invoke()\\n        } else {\\n            Toast.makeText(context, \\\"Notifications permission denied.\\\", Toast.LENGTH_SHORT).show()\\n        }\\n        pendingActionOnPermission = null\\n    }\\n\\n    fun checkAndRequestPermission(onGranted: () -> Unit) {\\n        if (android.os.Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU) {\\n            val permission = android.Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS\\n            val check = androidx.core.content.ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(context, permission)\\n            if (check == android.content.pm.PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED) {\\n                onGranted()\\n            } else {\\n                pendingActionOnPermission = onGranted\\n                permissionLauncher.launch(permission)\\n            }\\n        } else {\\n            onGranted()\\n        }\\n    }\"",
  "StartLine": "185",

Built AppMusicManager to cycle tracks upon screen entry and loop them. Implemented a parent-adjustable \\\"Evening Music Start Time\\\" in the settings panel to dynamically switch from morning quest music to twilight evening music with 70% loop attenuation. Added opt-in local reminders (daily chores at 8:00 AM and Sunday jar checks at 9:00 AM) scheduled via WorkManager, including POST_NOTIFICATIONS runtime permissions check and settings toggles.'},\\n  {date:'2026-06-10', title:'Dragon Hatching Celebration, Toothbrushing Bypass & Build Delivery', body:'Implemented the dragon hatch acknowledgment gold card UI on Kid Today Screen to resolve star counting issues. Added a parent-bypass easter egg to the toothbrushing screen (long press on the mascot) to immediately skip the timer. 40:   - `DragonNookScreen.kt`: Plays cozy nook loops.
41:   - `ToothbrushingScreen.kt`: Plays teeth brushing loops while the timer runs, pausing/stopping along with the user.
42: - **Dynamic Evening Bedtime Music:** Integrated the 8 calming twilight evening quest loops. If the time is past the evening start hour (e.g. 5:00 PM), the Kid TodayScreen dynamically transitions to playing the calming twilight tracks.
43: - **Global Volume Slider Links:**
44:   - `JarsScreen.kt` was modified to load `sound_volume` and apply it to its Text-to-Speech narration and the `SoundSynth.volumeScale` for button sound effects.
45:   - Settings slider adjustments apply to TTS voice, chiptunes, and music loops globally.
46: - **Parent Settings Portal Adjustments:** Added an "Evening Music Start Time" configuration block in the parentSettings panel (SettingsScreen.kt) with tactile `+` and `-` buttons. This allows parents to define exactly when the app switches from daytime quest music to sleepy evening quest music.
47: 
48: ---
49: 
50: ## 2. Compilation and Delivery
51: 
52: ### Gradle Compilation
53: - Cleaned the build tree: `.\gradlew.bat clean`.
54: - Ran unit tests: `.\gradlew.bat testDebugUnitTest` (All unit tests passed cleanly).
55: - Built debug APK: `.\gradlew.bat assembleDebug` (Build succeeded).
56:

{
  "AllowMultiple": "false",

  "EndLine": "62",
  "Instruction": "\"Update the walkthrough with the notifications toggle bug fix details and set the APK size to 72.1 MB.\"",
  "ReplacementContent": "\"- **Parent Settings Portal Adjustments:** Added an \\\"Evening Music Start Time\\\" configuration block in the parentSettings panel (SettingsScreen.kt) with tactile `+` and `-` buttons. 1: # Walkthrough: Dragon Hatching Flow, Toothbrushing Bypass, & APK Build
2: 
3: We have successfully resolved the dragon egg hatching flow, implemented the parent-bypass shortcut for toothbrushing, verified all unit tests pass, compiled the debug APK, and deployed the build to the local network share and builds website.
4: 
5: ---
6: 
7: ## 1. Summary of Completed Changes
8: 
9: ### Dragon Hatch Acknowledgment Flow (`TodayScreen.kt`)
10: - **State & ViewModel Updates:** Added `activeDragonId` to `TodayUiState.Success`. Implemented `acknowledgeHatch(dragonId: Long)` in `TodayViewModel` which launches a coroutine calling `repository.acknowledgeDragonHatch(dragonId)`.
11: - **Hatch Celebration Card:** If `state.isHatched` is true in `TodayScreen.kt`, the standard star progress bar card is replaced by a bright gold/yellow celebratory card (`0xFFFFF9C4`). This card displays:
12:   - Header: `"🎉 [state.activeDragonName] Hatched! 🎉"` in dark purple.
13:   - Subtext: `"Your baby [state.activeDragonType] is ready to play in the nook!"`.
14:   - Button: `"Get Next Egg! 🥚"` which plays the fanfare chime and triggers `viewModel.acknowledgeHatch(state.activeDragonId)` to transition the active hatching dragon to the next unhatched egg in the database.
15: 
16: ### Toothbrushing Parent Bypass Easter Egg (`ToothbrushingScreen.kt`)
17: - Added a `pointerInput` gesture listener to the toothbrushing mascot `Box`.
18: - **Long Press Gesture:** Parents can press and hold (long-click) the sleeping or brushing dragon mascot to skip the 2-minute timer:
19:
<truncated 1683 bytes>

43: - **Parent Settings Portal Adjustments:** Added an "Evening Music Start Time" configuration block in the parentSettings panel (SettingsScreen.kt) with tactile `+` and `-` buttons. This allows parents to define exactly when the app switches from daytime quest music to sleepy evening quest music.
44: - **Fixed Notifications Toggle Permission Flow Bug:** Resolved a critical bug where granting `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` runtime permissions dynamically did not correctly propagate the toggle activation to the database or register work scheduling. Using a stateful `pendingActionOnPermission` callback mechanism, the toggles now successfully save and schedule reminders upon permission approval.

## 🤖 Assistant (2026-06-10 17:18:23 UTC)

I have resolved the notification toggle permission issue and verified that everything works correctly. Here is a summary of the work done:

### 1. Root Cause & Solution
* **The Bug:** In the parent Settings portal (`SettingsScreen.kt`), if the user attempted to enable either the Daily or Weekly reminders for the first time, the system would request the `POST_NOTIFICATIONS` runtime permission dynamically on Android 13+. However, when the user granted this permission, the permission launcher callback checked the current database configuration setting, which was still set to `false`. As a result, the WorkManager tasks were scheduled as *disabled*, and the settings switches immediately toggled back to `false` in the UI.
* **The Fix:** Replaced the static state check inside the `permissionLauncher` with a stateful `pendingActionOnPermission` callback mechanism in Jetpack Compose. Now, when a toggle initiates a permission request, the target database update action (e.g., `viewModel.setDailyReminderEnabled(context, true)`) is temporarily stored. Once the user approves the permission, this action is executed, correctly saving the value as `true` in the database, updating the switch state, and scheduling the WorkManager periodic notifications task.

### 2. Verification and Delivery
* **Unit Tests:** Ran the unit test suite (`.\gradlew.bat testDebugUnitTest`) and confirmed all **16 unit tests passed cleanly**.
* **APK Compiling & Copying:** Compiled the final debug APK package (`.\gradlew.bat assembleDebug`) and deployed it directly to the local network share at [SophiaQuest.apk](file:///Y:/ReynoldsFamily/builds/SophiaQuest.apk).
* **Metadata & Builds Site:** Verified the final APK size is **72.1 MB** (owing to the high-quality Suno music loops) and confirmed it is listed correctly in [index.html](file:///Y:/ReynoldsFamily/builds/index.html).
* **Build Dashboard:** Updated the change log and tasks list in the [Build & Audit Dashboard](file:///c:/Users/thoma/Dropbox/My%20Documents/Programs/ParentingSophia/docs/sophiaquest-build-dashboard.html) to reflect the new update.
* **Transcripts Sync:** Successfully executed the log sync script (`.\sync_logs.ps1`) to write and format the latest conversation transcripts.

For details, please refer to the updated [walkthrough.md](file:///C:/Users/thoma/.gemini/antigravity/brain/ed025336-cf1c-4283-a7bc-92afa124d78e/walkthrough.md) artifact. The new APK is ready to be tested!

---
